rationale: The authoritative metric dictionary establishes that bot-adjusted retention, not raw retention, controls the decision. The authoritative quality audit reports bot-adjusted 30-day retention of 8% and an eligible sample size of 720. Although the eligible sample meets the minimum of 500, retention is below the required 10%, so the release rule is not satisfied. The dashboard note corroborates that the visible raw 12% should not drive release.
uncertainty: No material uncertainty remains in the supplied evidence: both controlling values are provided authoritatively.
